title: nodejs-single threaded
desc: node js is a single threaded runtime but manages to be non blocking through asyncronous operations-thanks to the event loop. from queuing apis(callback queue)-which follows fifo to call stack which follows lifo- to priotizing micro task such as (promise) to macro tasks such as timers or i/o operations

title: sitting with complexity
desc: realized the only way out of facing a sudden complexity while building is through complexity; most time when i come across one i alawys assume i needed to solve somthing simple first to be able to handle this or procrastinate to go work on something new or different. i was wrong and holding a wrong mindset.

title: feat: implemented an exponential back off
desc: implemented an exponential back off to handle db connection retries within max time and eventually give up to process.exit 1 if failed

title: process.exit(1)
desc: add process exit 1 to terminate the server incase of db connectiion fail in other to manage resources, tho the process manager keeps restarting subsequently in hopes of a succeful connection

title: systemic thinking : (state ->  event -> transition)
desc: A better approach to writing code instead of just iterating on a fractured thought, i start by really thinking from the user's pov, list out all possible state, event and transition and invariants. then begin wrting and reiterating on a solid system

title: Configured Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS)
desc: Implemented CORS middleware to whitelist the production frontend URL. Defined allowed origins, methods, and headers to enable secure cross-domain communication between the frontend and the Python backend.
